prompt: Find every file in ~/Desktop/kinbench/ whose name contains 'kinbench-search-062' and write each matching path (one per line) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/062-search-results.txt. You can use Finder's Cmd+F search field or shell tools — whichever is faster. The eval verifies the result file's contents. Fast path: cerebellum 'finder search ~/Desktop/kinbench/ kinbench-search-062 ~/Desktop/kinbench/062-search-results.txt'.
